items.title: Metaplanet raises $50M in zero-interest bonds to buy more Bitcoin
items.summary: Metaplanet raises $50 million through zero-interest bonds from EVO FUND to expand its Bitcoin treasury, extending its capital markets-driven accumulation strategy.

items.title: Mutation testing for the agentic era
items.summary: Code coverage is one of the most dangerous quality metrics in software testing. Many developers fail to realize that code coverage lies by omission: it measures execution, not verification. Test suites with high coverage can obfuscate the fact that critical functionality is untes

items.title: Bitcoin is on track for its best month in a year. $5 billion USDT growth fuels the rebound
items.summary: Strong earnings season trumps geopolitical risks for now, one trader said, as equities and crypto markets "stopped caring" about Iran war headlines.

items.title: Bitcoin stays 'stalled' at $78K as oil threatens new risk-asset squeeze
items.summary: Bitcoin and risk assets faced an uphill struggle after the S&P 500 hit new all-time highs as analysis warned that BTC price support was at risk.

items.title: Nakamoto taps Bitwise and Kraken for Bitcoin options strategy to hedge risk
items.summary: Nakamoto launched a Bitcoin derivatives program with Bitwise and Kraken, aiming to generate options premiums and hedge part of its BTC treasury exposure.

items.title: Strategy stock beats Bitcoin after rising 25% in a month: BTC bottom in?
items.summary: Historically, MSTR’s outperformance signals traders are taking more risk, betting Bitcoin’s worst drawdown phase may be over.

items.title: XRP price risks 40% decline versus Bitcoin despite 9-day ETF inflow streak
items.summary: Spot XRP ETFs record net inflows for nine consecutive days, absorbing sell pressure and potentially supporting XRP price recovery over time.

items.title: Trailmark turns code into graphs
items.summary: We’re open-sourcing Trailmark, a library that parses source code into a queryable call graph of functions, classes, call relationships, and semantic metadata, then exposes that graph through a Python API that Claude skills can call directly. Install it now: uv pip install trailma

items.title: Crypto is built for AI agents, not humans, says Alchemy's CEO
items.summary: Alchemy CEO Nikil Viswanathan argues the global financial system was designed for humans, but the next wave of commerce will be driven by AI agents that operate natively in crypto.

items.title: Trump defends crypto legislation at private event featuring boxer Mike Tyson, Tether CEO
items.summary: President Donald Trump, at a Mar-a-Lago gathering of investors in his self-branded memecoin, said crypto is mainstream and banks should back off the industry's bill.

items.title: BlackRock’s bitcoin ETF just hit a massive milestone that proves crypto is now a mainstream bet
items.summary: IBIT options open interest topped Deribit on Friday, signaling rapid institutional adoption of regulated crypto derivatives in the U.S.

items.title: How Anthropic’s Mythos model is forcing the crypto industry to rethink everything about security
items.summary: DeFi leaders say that AI will arm both attackers and defenders, and widen the gap between projects that prioritize security and those that do not.

items.title: Bitcoin falls after Trump reportedly canceled Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner's Iran-talks trip
items.summary: Trump is expected to speak at his crypto conference in Palm Beach shortly.

items.title: Mike Tyson, Tether CEO, Cathie Wood among speakers at Trump's 'most exclusive' crypto conference
items.summary: The event, at which Trump himself is scheduled to speak, gathers top-tier holders of the $TRUMP meme coin.

items.title: Bitcoin at $40,000 would be 'near-unprecedented' statistical outcome, analyst says
items.summary: Mean-reversion models suggest bearish targets imply a 0.4th percentile event, far beyond typical market corrections.

items.title: Europe’s banks are going all in on crypto
items.summary: Brahimi explores the impact of European banks' integration of digital assets into their existing brokerage and payments infrastructure in the wake of MiCA.

items.title: Coinbase’s Jesse Pollak says AI agents are the next big wave for crypto payments
items.summary: Pollak, who will be speaking at Consensus Miami 2026 next month, also sees the open-source protocol x402 as a key part of that wave.

items.title: Clock is ticking for bitcoin to prevent quantum threat as it could drain 6.9 million BTC including Satoshi’s
items.summary: Can a network without formal governance coordinate the biggest cryptographic migration in its history?

items.title: Ripple-linked XRP stalls near $1.44 as 'triangle squeeze' nears breakout
items.summary: Price holds in tight range after high-volume move, with compression signaling a decisive move as institutional demand quietly builds.

items.title: US DOJ sentences man to 70 months in prison for role in $263M scam group
items.summary: The group spent tens of millions of dollars on luxury items and real estate, using funds stolen from crypto users in social engineering scams.
